exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending knees and hips until thighs are parallel to the floor. Drive through your heels to return to starting position.

exercises.name: Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides. Curl the weights up while keeping your upper arms stationary. Squeeze at the top, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.description: Start standing, drop into a squat with hands on the floor, kick feet back to plank, do a push-up, jump feet to hands, then explosively jump up with arms overhead.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, barbell over mid-foot. Hinge at hips, grip bar outside knees. Keep back flat, drive through heels to stand tall. Reverse to lower.

exercises.name: Tricep Dips
exercises.description: Grip parallel bars with arms straight. Lower your body by bending elbows until upper arms are parallel to floor. Press back up to starting position.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: Start in high plank position. Drive one knee toward chest, then quickly switch legs. Continue alternating at a rapid pace while maintaining plank form.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.description: Start in forearm plank position with elbows under shoulders. Keep body in straight line from head to heels. Engage core and hold position.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.description: Stand facing a sturdy box. Swing arms back, then explosively jump onto the box, landing softly with both feet. Step down and repeat.

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly. Hold weight at chest, rotate torso to touch weight to floor on each side while keeping hips stable.
